The authors acknowledge the investigators who generated and deposited the publicly available datasets used in this study.

Analysis scripts and derived non-restricted outputs will be deposited in a public GitHub repository after completion of the full manuscript and before submission. The final repository URL will be added to the manuscript.

All datasets analyzed in this study are publicly available from the NCBI Gene Expression Omnibus under accession numbers GSE112098, GSE186800, GSE252321 and GSE280297. No new primary datasets were generated.
